enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from Boulder, describes his day working on a ski resort distances project for his website, mentions calling his mom, and rambles about his diet, being high, and plans to listen to 'The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire' to improve his videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: thinks it's getting really good, mostly rice and vegetables
being high all the time actually helps his diet rather than causing junk food cravings
wants to listen to Decline and Fall to become more well-rounded and make his videos more interesting
matter-of-fact recollection of being there when it went legal around April 2014, no strong editorial stance

entities: The History of the Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire (Gibbon)
